result.title: ACTIA iCAN
result.meta_description: ACTIA iCAN telematics box for real-time vehicle data reading.
result.description: The ACTIA iCAN is a plug-and-play telematics box that connects directly to the vehicle’s OBD Diag port, allowing real-time reading of original manufacturer vehicle data. It combines OBD, CAN, and DIAG protocols to access over 300 data points, including status and live information, and translates proprietary diagnostic trouble codes for connected maintenance.

result.description: Fifotrack A300 is an advanced vehicle GPS tracker suitable for diverse fleet and personal car management needs. result.title: Fifotrack A500
result.meta_description: 3G GPS tracker for diverse management applications, supporting multiple protocols and functions, ensuring durability and efficient integration.
result.description: The Fifotrack A500 is a multifunctional 3G GPS tracker designed for a range of management applications including fleet, public transportation, school bus, taxi operation, vehicle insurance company, rent car management, and private car anti-theft. The device supports RS232 and 1-Wire protocols, enabling functionalities such as taking pictures, driver identification and management, impulse detection, and temperature monitoring. It covers standard vehicle tracking demands with features like fuel monitoring, harsh acceleration/braking alarm, driving behavior analysis, custom digital input, jamming detection, two-way calling, and OTA functions. It offers multiple functions in one device, such as support for camera, RFID, iButton reader, fingerprint scanner, ultrasonic fuel sensor, temperature sensor, fuel theft/filling alerts, over-speeding buzzer reminders, and two-way communication through microphone and speaker.

result.title: Fifotrack A600
result.meta_description: Advanced GPS tracker for various management purposes with multiple ports, 1-Wire protocol, fuel and temperature monitoring.
result.description: The Fifotrack A600 is an advanced GPS tracking device designed for a range of management purposes including fleet management, public transportation management, school bus management, taxi operation management, vehicle insurance company management, rent car management, and private car anti-theft. It comes equipped with four RS232 ports and supports the 1-Wire protocol, enabling various powerful functions such as picture taking, driver identification and management, impulse detection, and temperature monitoring. Moreover, the A600 caters to the normal demands of vehicle tracking with features like fuel monitoring, harsh acceleration/braking alarm, driving behavior analysis, custom digital input, jamming detection, two-way calling, and OTA functions. The device is noted for its good hardware power system and protection design, preventing device burning issues and promising a longer lifetime, making it a durable option in the market.

result.title: Fifotrack A700
result.meta_description: Advanced GPS tracker with versatile fleet management, robust design, and multiple functional ports.
result.description: Fifotrack A700 is a versatile GPS tracker ideal for fleet, school bus, taxi, and vehicle insurance management. Equipped with 4 RS232 ports and 1-Wire protocol, it supports functionalities like picture taking, driver ID, temperature monitoring, fuel theft alerts, and two-way communication. It features a robust power system, ensuring no device burning issues. Its durable design makes it a lasting solution, especially for rental services. Dimensions are 90*60*27mm, weight 145g, and an internal battery life of up to 15 hours in sleep mode.

result.title: Fifotrack Q2
result.meta_description: Portable GPS tracker for various user groups, offers two-way communication, WiFi indoor tracking, IP67 waterproofing, and up to 15 days working time.
result.description: The Fifotrack Q2 is a contemporary portable GPS tracker ideal for monitoring kids, elders, employees, lone workers, pets, animals, and valuable assets. This device is well-balanced in terms of size and battery longevity, offering a working time of up to 15 days at a 24-hour tracking interval or up to 3 days at a 5-minute tracking interval, ensuring consistent monitoring over extended periods. It has earned the IP67 waterproof standard making it a fit for outdoor uses. One of the standout features is its two-way communication facilitated by an in-built microphone and speaker, enabling interactions between the user and a pre-set SOS phone guardian. Adding to its versatility is a WiFi function that provides an indoor tracking option. The device is powered by a 1000mAh lithium-ion battery and comes with a cradle for charging. Its built-in 6-axis motion sensor paired with an efficient firmware algorithm allows for the accurate detection of Tilt/Man down/Fall down events, enhancing its safety monitoring capabilities. This device operates on a 4G network and also offers a stable GPS/GSM signal for reliable tracking.

result.title: Fifotrack Q3
result.meta_description: 4G+2G LTE personal GPS tracker, IP67 waterproof, two-way communication, fall detection, WiFi tracking, built-in 1000mAh battery.
result.description: The Fifotrack Q3 is a 4G+2G LTE personal GPS tracker tailored for diverse tracking needs including the elderly, children, employees, lone workers, pets, animals, and valuable assets. It achieves a harmony between compactness and battery longevity, providing up to 6.5 days of working time with a 10-minute tracking interval. The device is IP67 certified, making it suitable for outdoor usage. Notably, it supports two-way communication courtesy of its in-built microphone and speaker, allowing for interaction between the user and a preset SOS phone contact. The Q3 also has a fall detection feature powered by a built-in 3-axis motion sensor and a smart firmware algorithm. Other highlights include a stable GPS/GSM signal, a built-in 1000mAh lithium-ion battery, WiFi tracking option, no movement alarm, and charging via a cradle, ensuring it remains a reliable tracking companion in various scenarios.

result.title: Iridium Digital-Matter
result.meta_title: Iridium Edge Digital Matter Satellite module
result.meta_description: Iridium Digital-Matter is a Digital Matter device that utilizes Iridium Edge modem to deliver data packets to flespi via satellite communication.
result.description:
Iridium Digital-Matter is a Digital Matter device that utilizes Iridium Edge modem to deliver data packets to flespi via satellite communication. User-defined payload within Iridium Digital-Matter is parsed according to specific Digital Matter protocol.

Iridium Edge is a cost-effective satellite IoT communications device with an all-in-one SBD module, antenna, and power supply. The plug-and-play satellite IoT terminal can be easily paired with the Digital Matter G130 device in order to expand their functionality to no GSM coverage zones. Current Iridium implementation offers the ability to generate and send SBD records after set period after the GSM signal is lost. This ensures constant connectivity for the clients as Iridium network is available globally.

Check more details here: https://support.digitalmatter.com/support/solutions/articles/16000100489-g120-iridium-quick-start-guide

result.title: Iridium Edge
result.meta_description: Iridium Edge is a cost-effective satellite IoT communications device that can complement terrestrial-based solutions to create worldwide connectivity.
result.description:
Iridium Edge is a cost-effective satellite IoT communications device that can complement terrestrial-based solutions to create worldwide connectivity. Iridium Edge features an all-in-one SBD module and antenna, with power supply. The plug-and-play satellite IoT terminal can be easily paired with existing satellite and cellular solutions.

For Iridium Edge device, flespi saves its custom data packet as payload.hex, and it can be parsed with the PVM plugin according to user logic.

result.title: Kingsword ET-01 beta
result.meta_description: Compact GPS/GLONASS vehicle tracker with real-time tracking and remote engine control.
result.description: ET-01 beta is a compact multifunctional vehicle tracker with GPS and GLONASS support. It offers fast and accurate location tracking, ignition detection, GPRS communication, and built-in battery backup. Features include geo-fence alerts, mileage queries, power saving mode, and remote engine control. The device is capable of storing data when offline and supports UDP & TCP network functions for PC web and APP tracking.

result.title: Kingsword ET-03
result.meta_description: Compact GPS tracker with real-time vehicle tracking, geofence, and low power consumption.
result.description: ET-03 is a compact vehicle GPS tracker designed for a variety of vehicles, providing precise and efficient tracking. It features a small form factor, real-time tracking, low power consumption, built-in battery for backup, remote engine power control, multi-zone geofencing, various alarms for security, and supports both UDP and TCP protocols. Suitable for cars and motorcycles, the device ensures continual monitoring with up to a 10 Hz GPS update rate and accommodates a wide input voltage range.

result.title: Kingsword ET-07
result.meta_description: Compact 4G LTE GPS vehicle tracker with Beidou support and low power consumption.
result.description: The ET-07 is a compact 4G LTE vehicle tracker with GPS and Beidou support, designed for accurate and fast vehicle tracking. It features a working voltage of DC:7~60V, a built-in battery for back-up, low power consumption, and several I/O connections for extensive compatibility. The device supports setting up geo-fences, engine ignition detection, and has a variety of alarm modes including an optional SOS feature. Additionally, it offers data storage when GPRS is unavailable and supports both UDP & TCP communication.

result.title: Kingsword ET-09

result.description: The ET-09 is a compact and waterproof pet GPS tracker offering precision within 5-10m, supporting GPS, BDS, and GLONASS. It features a small size, automatic data storage without GPRS, low power consumption, SMS and online tracking, history playback, geo-fencing, and vibration & movement alarms.

result.title: Kingsword ET-10
result.meta_description: Portable GPS tracker with solar power charging, long standby, and SOS alarm.
result.description: The ET-10 is a compact, portable GPS tracker that comes with solar charging capability and doubles as a power bank. Features include waterproof design, multiple satellite system support (GPS, BDS, GLONASS), low power consumption with a sleep mode, fast and accurate location tracking, automatic data storage, long standby time, and an emergency SOS alarm.

result.title: Kingsword ET-60W
result.meta_description: Compact 4G vehicle tracker with high precision GPS, GLONASS, alarms, and optional SOS.
result.description: The ET-60W is a compact 4G vehicle tracker designed for precision and performance. It supports positioning through GPS, BDS, and GLONASS with a high accuracy of <5-10m. It prevents static drift and retains data without GPRS. Key features include a built-in 600mAh battery, low power consumption, waterproof build, SMS/online tracking, driving history, engine ignition detection, various alarms, and optional temperature, fuel monitoring, RFID, LoRa, and SOS functionality.

result.title: Kingsword ET-80x
result.meta_description: Compact 4G vehicle GPS tracker with high accuracy, waterproof design and built-in battery.
result.description: The ET-80 4G tracker is a compact 4G vehicle GPS tracking device with Beidou and GPS support. It features high locating accuracy, low power consumption, a built-in battery providing 5 hours of working time without external power, multiple alarm modes including geo-fence and over speed, and is waterproof. The tracker also supports data storage if GPRS communication is unavailable, engine ignition detection, and remote control of engine power.

result.description:
Megastek S921 home base station is an auxiliary device for prisoners' ankle models MT200X and MT65. If the ankle is within 15-20 meters of S921, the station will report the location (at home) to the server. Beyond this range, S921 will not be able to detect the ankle and report outdoor information. S921 is installed in a fixed position.

The device features a power off alarm, SOS emergency alarm, removal alarm, hit alarm, heartbeat package, internal battery, Wi-Fi, and more.

result.title: Morey MCX101
result.meta_description: Morey MCX101 is an advanced LTE CAT1 OBDII tracker with Bluetooth.
result.description: Morey MCX101 is an OBDII tracking terminal with GNSS and GSM connectivity, which is able to collect device coordinates and transfer them via the GSM network to a server. This device is perfectly suitable for applications, which require the location acquirement of remote objects. Morey MCX101 represents the next step in communication technology – this is the first Plug and track LTE OBD device with GNSS and Bluetooth connectivity. Possibility to read OBD II parameters, effortless installation, and detailed accelerometer data provide a compelling solution. This is the perfect tracker for a wide range of applications – fleet management of light commercial vehicles, car rental & leasing, driver log-book, insurance telematics (UBI), and so on. The device supports various Bluetooth Low Energy sensors, beacons, firmware, and configuration update via Bluetooth.

result.description: SPOT Gen3 is the latest generation of SPOT GPS tracking device that uses the Globalstar satellite network to provide text messaging and GPS tracking. result.description: SPOT X is a GPS tracking device that uses the Globalstar satellite network to provide text messaging and GPS tracking. This protocol fetches messages from SPOT Shared Page and delivers them into the channel; for that reason, 2-way messaging will not work on flespi.

result.title: Streamax AD plus

result.description: Streamax AD Plus is an advanced AI-enabled dash camera designed for enhancing fleet safety with 4-channel video recording. Features include ADAS calibration, harsh driving detection with a G-sensor, dual TF card storage, and low-power consumption sleep mode with integrated Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and LTE for live streaming and event uploads.

result.title: Streamax AD plus 2.0

result.title: Streamax C6 Lite
result.meta_description: Efficient fleet management dashcam with 4G, Wi-Fi, and vehicle positioning.
result.description: The Streamax C6 Lite is an advanced dashcam designed for efficient fleet management. This compact device offers ultra-wide 143° video recording up to 1080P UHD, dual 256GB Micro SD storage, Wi-Fi, 4G, and vehicle positioning. Features AES256 encryption, several I/O ports including CAN and RS232, a 6-axis gravity sensor for driving event detection, two-way audio with noise cancellation, and various power modes. Despite its comprehensive capabilities, its installation is straightforward with an OBD power supply and the design does not obstruct the driver's view.

result.title: Streamax X3-H0402
result.meta_description: Streamax X3-H0402 is an MDVR for vehicle video surveillance and remote monitoring.
result.description:
Streamax X3-H0402 is an MDVR for vehicle video surveillance and remote monitoring. The device features a high-speed processor and embedded operating system combined with the most advanced H.264 video compression/decompression technology, network, as well as GPS positioning technology. It supports not only video recording in 720P, WD1, HD1, and CIF formats, but also vehicle travel information recording and wireless data upload. The device collects rich location-related information.

Important: flespi currently only parses the location data coming from the device but does not process or store the video stream.

result.title: Thingsys TS-V1
result.meta_description: Professional Vehicle GPS Tracker with real-time monitoring and management capabilities.
result.description: The Thingsys TS-V1 is a professional vehicle GPS tracker for real-time monitoring and management of various vehicles. Its core functionalities include emergency alarms, remote fuel and circuit control, movement and overspeed alerts, geo-fencing, auto-tracking, and compatibility with original anti-theft systems. Additionally, it provides mileage statistics, ACC checking, and power-off alarms. The device operates on 2G/3G/4G networks and features a rechargeable Li-ion battery and digital/analog inputs for sensor integration. Its sturdy design is suitable for harsh environments with operational temperatures ranging from -20°C to +70°C and non-condensing humidity of 5% to 95%.

result.title: Traccar client
result.meta_description: Traccar client turns any smartphone (Android, iOS) into a GPS tracker.
result.description:
Traccar client turns any smartphone into a GPS tracker (Android, iOS). It reports location to your own or hosted server with selected time intervals.

With the traccar-client device connected to the respective channel, you can get the telemetry data from your Traccar client app straight into flespi and store the data long-term. 

You can follow step-by-step instructions on how-to connect Traccar client app to flespi here.

Note: by default, your traccar-client channel will start an HTTPS server, so use the "https://" prefix for the channel URI when configuring your Traccar application on the smartphone.

result.title: Twig SOSCard

result.description: Twig SOSCard is a lone worker alarm device in the form of an ID badge. The predefined emergency protocol transmits the last known user position and opens a two-way voice connection to the alarm receiving center (ARC). High-performance GNSS receiver with TWIG Point AGNSS, TWIG Point Netloc, TWIG Beacon on-site locating devices, Bluetooth low energy beacons (BLE), and Wi-Fi complimented with TWIG Point Monitor service for alarms monitoring and tracking is an efficient compilation of means to find of the person in distress. Hybrid indoor and outdoor location: Outdoor 4-constellation GNSS, Free TWIG Point AGNSS service for faster location fix, SRD3-option for hybrid indoor location: TWIG Beacon SRD, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and TWIG Point Netloc service for public space location (cellular + Wi-Fi) and on-site location (TWIG SRD + Wi-Fi + BLE).

result.description: Wonlex Kids GPS watches are designed for different age groups, but all of them feature basic functionality and cool and rich design. The Wonlex kids' smartwatches have SOS, voice messaging, multiple location tracking, alarm and two-way mobile calls, video call, schedules, and a combination of 2G/3G/4G networks. Water resistance will keep the watch safe when kids are having fun. The interface is simple and would not distract a child during classes. result.title: Wonlex Senior GPS Watch
result.meta_description: Wonlex Senior GPS Watch is a safety tracker with SOS alert, HR, BP, SpO2 measurements, fall detection, GPS locator, and a 2G/4G phone.
result.description: Wonlex Senior GPS Watch is a safety tracker with SOS alert, HR, BP, SpO2 measurements, fall detection, GPS locator, and a 2G/4G phone. Pressing SOS will trigger a call to emergency contacts, alerting them and sending them an SMS with your GPS location. The loved ones and carers can request the GPS location via the app, and can be notified if the senior person leaves a designated ‘Safe Zone’. What’s more, your loved ones and carers can check your health stats like heart rate, blood pressure, blood oxygen as well, prompting them to check-in and make sure you are in a good health.

result.title: Xirgo FM-500 Blue
result.meta_description: Xirgo ​FM-500 Blue is a device with GPS/GLONASS and GSM connectivity, designed for object tracking
result.description: Xirgo FM-500 Blue is a device with GPS/GLONASS and GSM connectivity, designed for object tracking. It is able to acquire information on object location, speed, direction, etc., and transfer the data via GSM network. Digital and analog inputs of the device may be used to connect different external sensors/devices. Outputs of the device may be used to control external equipment remotely. FM Blue is able to read FMS CAN data (protocol J1939) from vehicles. Flexible configuration allows users/dealers to adjust the device to meet their specific requirements.

result.title: Xirgo FMS500 XtCAN
result.meta_description: Versatile vehicle tracker with CAN-bus and temperature monitoring.
result.description: FMS500 XtCAN is a versatile vehicle tracking and telematics device with dual CAN-bus connections. It supports FMS CAN protocol, monitors temperature and fuel levels, and offers geofencing, driver identification, and remote output control. The device includes an accelerometer, operates on a wide voltage range, and has internal memory for extensive data logging. It is equipped with GSM jamming detection, internal GNSS antenna, and is designed to be installed securely within the vehicle cabin.

result.title: Xirgo XG3700 LIGHT SDK
result.meta_title: Xirgo XG3700 LIGHT SDK GPS tracker
result.meta_description: Xirgo XG3700 LIGHT SDK is a basic vehicle GNSS tracker with LTE support and MQTT-based data transfer protocol.
result.description: Xirgo XG3700 LIGHT SDK is a basic vehicle GNSS tracker with LTE support and MQTT-based data transfer protocol. The device features an accelerometer, internal odometer, 1-Wire interface, 3 digital inputs, 3 analog inputs, 2 digital outputs, optional waterproof (IP67) casing, and more. The functionality includes driver identification, geofencing, fuel level sensors support, temperature/humidity sensors support, overspeeding control, eco-driving, fuel flow meters support, remote output control, etc.

result.title: Xirgo XT-6300
result.meta_description: Xirgo XT-6300: Advanced LTE vehicle tracker with GPS, OBDII/JBUS options, and fleet management features.
result.description: The Xirgo XT-6300 is a versatile GPS vehicle tracker supporting LTE and 2G networks, designed for a wide range of vehicles. It features an integrated high-precision GPS engine, 3-axis accelerometer, motion detection, optional OBDII and CAN BUS interface, and a 1-Wire bus interface. Ideal for fleet management, it offers enhanced control and monitoring capabilities, with optional Bluetooth connectivity and an embedded cellular antenna for robust communication.
